name: AMD Ryzen 9 7950X
description: 16-core, 32-thread desktop processor with 5.7GHz max boost, 80MB cache, AM5 socket. Ideal for high-performance gaming and content creation.

name: AMD Ryzen 7 7800X3D
description: 8-core, 16-thread gaming processor with 3D V-Cache technology, 5.0GHz max boost, 96MB cache. The ultimate gaming CPU.

name: Intel Core i9-14900K
description: 24-core (8P+16E), 32-thread processor with 6.0GHz max turbo, 36MB cache, LGA1700 socket. Top-tier performance for enthusiasts.

name: Intel Core i5-14600K
description: 14-core (6P+8E), 20-thread processor with 5.3GHz max turbo, 24MB cache. Excellent price-to-performance for gaming.

name: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4090
description: 24GB GDDR6X, 16384 CUDA cores, DLSS 3.0, ray tracing. The most powerful consumer GPU for 4K gaming and AI workloads.

name: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4070 Super
description: 12GB GDDR6X, 7168 CUDA cores, DLSS 3.0, excellent 1440p gaming with ray tracing support.

name: AMD Radeon RX 7900 XTX
description: 24GB GDDR6, 96 compute units, FSR 3.0, DisplayPort 2.1. AMD's flagship GPU for 4K gaming.

name: AMD Radeon RX 7600
description: 8GB GDDR6, 2048 stream processors, great 1080p gaming performance at an affordable price.

name: ASUS ROG Maximus Z790 Hero
description: LGA1700, DDR5, 5x M.2, WiFi 6E, Thunderbolt 4, PCIe 5.0. Premium Intel Z790 motherboard.

name: MSI MAG B650 Tomahawk WiFi
description: AM5 socket, DDR5, 2x M.2, WiFi 6E, 2.5G LAN. Great value B650 board for AMD Ryzen 7000.

name: Gigabyte X670E Aorus Master
description: AM5, DDR5, 4x M.2, WiFi 6E, PCIe 5.0, 10GbE LAN. Feature-packed AMD X670E motherboard.

name: ASRock B760M Pro RS/D4
description: LGA1700, DDR4, 2x M.2, PCIe 4.0, micro-ATX form factor. Budget-friendly Intel motherboard.

name: Corsair Vengeance DDR5 32GB (2x16GB)
description: 5600MHz CL36, Intel XMP 3.0, AMD EXPO, low-profile heat spreader. Reliable high-speed memory.

name: G.Skill Trident Z5 RGB 64GB (2x32GB)
description: 6000MHz CL30, DDR5, Intel XMP 3.0, customizable RGB lighting. Premium high-capacity kit.

name: Kingston Fury Beast DDR5 16GB (2x8GB)
description: 4800MHz CL40, compact heat spreader, Intel XMP 3.0. Entry-level DDR5 for budget builds.

name: Samsung 990 Pro 2TB NVMe SSD
description: PCIe 4.0, 7,450 MB/s read, 6,900 MB/s write, M.2 2280. Top-tier Gen4 SSD for gaming.

name: WD Black SN850X 4TB NVMe SSD
description: PCIe 4.0, 7,300 MB/s read, M.2 2280. Massive capacity with blazing speeds for pros.

name: Crucial P3 Plus 1TB NVMe SSD
description: PCIe 4.0, 5,000 MB/s read, M.2 2280. Affordable Gen4 SSD for everyday use.

name: Seagate Barracuda 4TB HDD
description: 7200 RPM, 256MB cache, 3.5-inch. High-capacity mechanical drive for bulk storage.

name: Corsair RM850x 850W
description: 80 PLUS Gold, fully modular, Zero RPM fan mode, 10-year warranty. Reliable premium PSU.

name: EVGA SuperNOVA 1000 G7 1000W
description: 80 PLUS Gold, fully modular, Eco Mode, 10-year warranty. Perfect for RTX 4090 builds.

name: be quiet! Pure Power 12 M 750W
description: 80 PLUS Gold, modular, 120mm Silent Wings fan, 5-year warranty. Quiet and efficient.

name: NZXT H7 Flow
description: Mid-tower, high airflow mesh front, tempered glass side panel, cable management bar. Clean design.

name: Fractal Design North
description: Mid-tower, real wood mesh front panel, tempered glass, compact ATX. Elegant aesthetics.

name: Lian Li O11 Dynamic EVO
description: Mid-tower, dual chamber, tempered glass on 3 sides, supports E-ATX. Show off your build.

name: Corsair iCUE H150i Elite LCD XT
description: 360mm AIO liquid cooler, LCD pump head display, ML120 RGB fans, excellent thermal performance.

name: Noctua NH-D15 chromax.black
description: Dual-tower air cooler, 2x 140mm NF-A15 fans, 250W TDP, legendary quiet performance.

name: Arctic Liquid Freezer II 280
description: 280mm AIO liquid cooler, VRM fan on pump block, exceptional price-to-performance.
